selections.name: She's Honed In
selections.reason: Projects a favorable pace scenario sitting just off the early speed duel. Highest recent speed figure (67) fits well in this class drop.

selections.name: If If If
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee dropping out of MSW company. Back figures suggest she is a major player if she can avoid a pressured duel.

selections.name: Helene's Power
selections.reason: Inside draw allows her to save ground. Posted a solid 73 speed figure two starts back which puts her right in the mix.

selections.name: Command The Stars
selections.reason: Class drop should help her find softer competition. Early speed type that could hold on for a minor share.

danger_horse.name: If If If
danger_horse.reason: Significant class drop from MSW to Claiming makes her a massive threat if she runs back to her 2-year-old form.

selections.name: One Giant Leap
selections.reason: Pace projection indicates a meltdown with 3+ 'E' types entered. This closer gets a massive +5 point adjustment and drops in class.

selections.name: Little Steven
selections.reason: Consistent early speed type drawn on the rail. Will have to work hard early but has the class to hang on for a piece.

selections.name: Khozy My Boy
selections.reason: Solid recent form and gets a jockey upgrade. Can stalk the pace if the early fractions get too hot.

selections.name: Dick Best
selections.reason: Presser style fits the pace scenario perfectly. Should get first run on the deep closers as the speed tires.

danger_horse.name: Eastside Cool
danger_horse.reason: Deep closer who will benefit immensely if the projected pace meltdown occurs.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet 9, Exacta Box 1-9, Trifecta 1,9 / 1,3,5,9 / ALL

selections.name: Instamania
selections.reason: Projects as the lone 'E' speed in this field, earning a +5 point pace bonus. Posted an 85 speed figure last out and should control the race.

selections.name: Whitley
selections.reason: Consistent presser who will get a great trip tracking the top pick. Figures are competitive for the level.

selections.name: Our Vekoma Ride
selections.reason: Lightly raced with room to improve. Should sit a mid-pack trip and make a late run for the exotics.

selections.name: Arco Thunder
selections.reason: Posted a 75 speed figure two starts back. Rail draw saves ground for a late push.

danger_horse.name: Whitley
danger_horse.reason: If the top pick fails to clear, this horse is perfectly positioned to inherit the lead.

selections.name: Beauty Reigns
selections.reason: Presser style gets the jump on the closers. Posted a strong 97 speed figure and has the tactical speed to avoid trouble.

selections.name: Untamed Moment
selections.reason: Outside draw for this speed type is ideal. Can clear or press depending on the break. 97 speed figure puts her right there.

selections.name: True Passion
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 99 speed figure. Will be closing late and benefits if the pace gets hot.

selections.name: Beautiful Twice
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with a 91 speed figure. Capable of hitting the board with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Untamed Moment
danger_horse.reason: Outside speed is always dangerous, especially if she clears without pressure.

selections.name: Like A Diamond
selections.reason: Significant class drop and possesses strong early pace. Should clear this field easily and wire them.

selections.name: Royal B
selections.reason: Good inside draw and tactical speed. Should sit right behind the top pick and hold on for second.

selections.name: J J's Sweet Bet
selections.reason: First-time starter in a weak field. Watch the tote board for clues, but has upside by default.

selections.name: Highway Seventy
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee who hasn't shown much yet, but the class drop could wake her up.

danger_horse.name: Jack's Gal
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could allow her to sneak away if the top pick misses the break.

selections.name: Western Warrior
selections.reason: Inside speed in a route race is a massive advantage. Posted an 85 speed figure and has excellent recent form.

selections.name: Honey's To Blame
selections.reason: McPeek/Esquivel connection is strong. 78 speed figure and should relish the distance.

selections.name: Chad Allan
selections.reason: Consistent runner with an 88 speed figure. Will be grinding late for a share.

selections.name: Thebabeslayer
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with a 96 speed figure. Rail draw is tricky but has the class to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Thebabeslayer
danger_horse.reason: Highest speed figure in the field; if he gets out of the gate cleanly, he is the horse to beat.

selections.name: Raging Current
selections.reason: Class drop and strong early speed. Outside draw keeps her out of trouble; should clear and wire.

selections.name: Cold Case
selections.reason: Outside draw is a plus. 62 speed figure makes her highly competitive in this weak maiden claiming event.

selections.name: She's An Earner
selections.reason: Consistent 72 speed figure. Will be closing late and can pick up the pieces if the pace is too fast.

selections.name: Highlight Show
selections.reason: Posted a 60 speed figure and has tactical speed to sit a good trip.

danger_horse.name: Cold Case
danger_horse.reason: Outside speed threat who could easily cross over and steal the race if the top pick falters.

selections.name: Pokerknightatvees
selections.reason: Strong early speed drawn outside. 99 speed figure is top tier here, and he should get a clean trip pressing or leading.

selections.name: Miracle Worker
selections.reason: Presser style with a 99 speed figure. Will get the perfect setup tracking the speed.

selections.name: Perfect Magic
selections.reason: Rail speed is always dangerous. 91 speed figure and will force the issue early.

selections.name: Dapper Moon
selections.reason: Solid 87 speed figure and consistent form. Good underneath use in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Perfect Magic
danger_horse.reason: If he breaks sharply from the rail, he could wire the field before the outside speed gets to him.

selections.name: Sticker Shock
selections.reason: Cox/Ortiz Jr connection. Strong pace presence and tactical speed to control the race flow.

selections.name: Scot's Law
selections.reason: 87 speed figure and strong connections. Will be tracking right behind the leaders.

selections.name: Knickleandime
selections.reason: Outside speed with an 82 speed figure. Can cross over and dictate terms if aggressive early.

selections.name: Miss Call
selections.reason: McPeek trainee with an 86 speed figure. Consistent closer who will benefit from a hot pace.

danger_horse.name: Scot's Law
danger_horse.reason: High figures and elite connections make her a massive threat to win.

selections.name: Otto The Conqueror
selections.reason: Class standout with a 103 speed figure. Rail draw is perfect for his early speed; Asmussen has him primed.

selections.name: See Through It
selections.reason: Strong early pace with a 95 speed figure. Will be the main pace pressure on the top pick.

selections.name: Gold Sweep
selections.reason: 101 speed figure makes him a major contender. Will stalk the top two and pounce if they duel.

selections.name: Big Vince
selections.reason: Outside closer with a 93 speed figure. Will be flying late to pick up the pieces.

danger_horse.name: See Through It
danger_horse.reason: If he out-breaks the rail horse, he could steal the race on the front end.

selections.name: Sovereignty
selections.reason: Elite 116 speed figure. Mott/Alvarado connection is lethal, and his presser style is perfect for this distance.

selections.name: Journalism
selections.reason: 109 speed figure and gets Irad Ortiz Jr. Will be tracking the pace and has the class to win.

selections.name: White Abarrio
selections.reason: Classiest horse in the field but form has been slipping. Still dangerous on back class alone.

selections.name: Publisher
selections.reason: 103 speed figure for Asmussen. Consistent type who can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: White Abarrio
danger_horse.reason: Grade 1 winner who can never be fully discounted despite recent form issues.

selections.name: Seraphia
selections.reason: Inside speed for Asmussen. 85 speed figure and should be able to control the pace in this spot.

selections.name: Thestral
selections.reason: Outside speed with an 84 speed figure. Will cross over early and ensure an honest pace.

selections.name: Kerry's Kiss
selections.reason: Closer with an 85 speed figure. Will benefit if the top two get into a speed duel.

selections.name: Mckinzie's Glory
selections.reason: Presser with a 90 speed figure. Gets a great trip tracking the leaders.

danger_horse.name: Thestral
danger_horse.reason: If she clears easily from the outside, she could wire the field.
